text.title: Earned Value Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: EV set to AC each period.
Measurement method changed from 50/50 to % complete in P5.
antipattern.fix: Lock method at baseline; restate if change unavoidable.

antipattern.symptom: EAC switches between formulae each period without note.
